movements.name: Arm Circles
movements.instruction: Stand tall and make large forward circles with both arms to loosen the shoulder joints and warm up the chest.

movements.name: Band Pull-Aparts
movements.instruction: Hold a resistance band at shoulder width and pull apart horizontally, squeezing your shoulder blades.

movements.name: Incline Push-ups
movements.instruction: Place hands on an elevated surface and perform slow push-ups to activate the pecs with minimal load.

movements.name: Dynamic Chest Stretch
movements.instruction: Stand in a doorway with arms at 90 degrees on the frame, lean forward gently and hold, then release and repeat.

movements.name: Cat-Cow Stretch
movements.instruction: On hands and knees, alternate between arching your back up (cat) and dropping your belly down (cow).

movements.name: Band Rows
movements.instruction: Loop a resistance band around a sturdy pole, step back for tension, and row both hands to your ribcage.

movements.name: Scapular Pull-ups
movements.instruction: Hang from a bar and retract your shoulder blades without bending your elbows — pure scapular movement.

movements.name: Thoracic Rotation
movements.instruction: On all fours, place one hand behind your head and rotate your upper body toward the ceiling, then back down.

movements.name: Arm Circles
movements.instruction: Make small to large circles with your arms extended, warming up the rotator cuff and deltoids.

movements.name: Band Dislocates
movements.instruction: Hold a resistance band wide and pass it over and behind your head in a full arc, then reverse.

movements.name: Wall Slides
movements.instruction: Stand with your back against a wall, arms in a 'W' shape, and slide them up to a 'Y' and back down.

movements.name: Light Lateral Raises
movements.instruction: With very light dumbbells or no weight, raise arms to the side to shoulder height and lower slowly.

movements.name: Wrist Circles
movements.instruction: Extend your arms and rotate your wrists in circles to warm up the forearm and bicep tendons.

movements.name: Light Curls
movements.instruction: Grab the lightest dumbbells available and perform slow, controlled curls for blood flow.

movements.name: Tricep Stretch
movements.instruction: Raise one arm overhead, bend at the elbow, and use the other hand to gently press the elbow back.

movements.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch
movements.instruction: Extend your arm with palm up, use the other hand to gently pull fingers back toward you.

movements.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch
movements.instruction: Extend your arm with palm down, use the other hand to gently press the back of the hand toward you.

movements.name: Grip Squeezes
movements.instruction: Rapidly squeeze and release a soft ball or make tight fists to pump blood into the forearms.

movements.name: Dead Bug
movements.instruction: Lie on your back with arms extended up and knees at 90 degrees. Alternate extending opposite arm and leg while keeping your lower back pressed to the floor.

movements.name: Plank Hold
movements.instruction: Hold a forearm plank with a straight line from head to heels, bracing your core.

movements.name: Cat-Cow
movements.instruction: On all fours, alternate between rounding your spine up and arching it down to mobilize the core.

movements.name: Standing Oblique Stretch
movements.instruction: Stand tall, reach one arm overhead and lean to the opposite side, stretching the obliques.

movements.name: Bodyweight Squats
movements.instruction: Perform slow, controlled bodyweight squats through full range of motion to warm up quads, glutes, and hips.

movements.name: Leg Swings (Front-to-Back)
movements.instruction: Hold a wall for balance and swing one leg forward and backward in a controlled arc.

movements.name: Leg Swings (Side-to-Side)
movements.instruction: Face the wall, hold for balance, and swing one leg across your body and out to the side.

movements.name: Walking Lunges
movements.instruction: Take exaggerated steps forward, dropping your back knee toward the floor with each step.

movements.name: Ankle Circles
movements.instruction: Lift one foot and rotate the ankle in circles to warm up the ankle joint.

movements.name: Glute Bridges
movements.instruction: Lie on your back with knees bent, drive through your heels to lift your hips and squeeze your glutes at the top.

movements.name: Clamshells
movements.instruction: Lie on your side with knees bent, keep feet together and open your top knee like a clamshell.

movements.name: Fire Hydrants
movements.instruction: On all fours, lift one knee out to the side while keeping it bent at 90 degrees.

movements.name: Hip Circles
movements.instruction: Stand on one leg and make large circles with the other knee to open up the hip joint.

movements.name: Calf Raises
movements.instruction: Stand on the edge of a step, lower your heels below the platform, then rise up onto your toes.

movements.name: Wall Calf Stretch
movements.instruction: Place hands on a wall, step one foot back, and press the heel into the floor with a straight leg.

movements.name: Ankle Circles
movements.instruction: Lift one foot off the ground and rotate the ankle in full circles.
